comment: Great video! Can you do a deep-dive tutorial on building custom MCP servers? That would be so helpful.
The audio in this episode was extremely quiet. I had to turn my speakers all the way up.
I really want a step-by-step video on how to deploy LLM agents to production. Most tutorials only show local runs.
Your pacing was way too fast in the coding section. Had to pause every 5 seconds to follow.
Would love a podcast episode discussing the future of agentic coding and developer jobs.
Can we get a comparison video between FastMCP and the official python-mcp SDK?
Audio quality has been a bit inconsistent lately. Pls fix the background hum.
Is there a github repo for this? It's really hard to copy code from the video screen.
